message:
fix: remove non-breaking hyphens from consulting page

Replace non-breaking hyphen characters (U+2011) with standard ASCII
hyphens in app/consulting/page.tsx. These invisible Unicode characters
can cause React Server Components serialization errors manifesting as
"Failed to execute 'appendChild' on 'Node': Invalid or unexpected token"
in production builds.

Affected strings:
- "multi-manager" (kicker)
- "AI-sensitive" (deep dives)
- "Nvidia-style", "over-earning" (risk identification)
- "One-off" (briefings)
- "Sector-specific" (sessions)
- "hands-on" (buildout)
- "follow-up" (delivery)
- "check-ins" (final deliverables)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ export default function ConsultingPage() { icon={Cpu} eyebrow="Consulting" title="AI, workflows, and markets for people who live inside risk limits" - kicker="I work with hedge funds, multi‑manager platforms, PE firms, and large allocators who need to reason clearly about AI and compute." + kicker="I work with hedge funds, multi-manager platforms, PE firms, and large allocators who need to reason clearly about AI and compute." headingLevel={1} >

@@ -41,13 +41,13 @@ export default function ConsultingPage() { Market & risk analysis

    -
  • Deep dives on AI‑sensitive names across the stack.
    • +
  • Deep dives on AI-sensitive names across the stack.
  • Scenario work around shifts like DeepSeek, cheaper inference, and new architectures.
  • - Identifying where Nvidia‑style over‑earning risk might show up + Identifying where Nvidia-style over-earning risk might show up next.
@@ -95,11 +95,11 @@ export default function ConsultingPage() {
  • - One‑off or recurring briefings on the state of AI and what + One-off or recurring briefings on the state of AI and what matters for your universe.
  • - Sector‑specific sessions for PMs or PE deal teams who need to + Sector-specific sessions for PMs or PE deal teams who need to underwrite AI risk and opportunity.
  • @@ -134,13 +134,13 @@ export default function ConsultingPage() { 3. Deep work phase. {" "} - Mix of calls, async memos, and hands‑on buildout where appropriate. + Mix of calls, async memos, and hands-on buildout where appropriate.
  • - 4. Delivery & follow‑up. + 4. Delivery & follow-up. {" "} - Final deliverables plus optional quarterly check‑ins if the mandate + Final deliverables plus optional quarterly check-ins if the mandate benefits from ongoing updates.
